emails.subject: Break
emails.body: Lisa, Breakfast sandwiches and coffee could be in order this morn. Let me know if you are down and when you can go. Also tell Jsarnow. late, Darren

emails.subject: RE: Break
emails.body: RE: Break a little hung over....hey did you ask your sister?????????????????????????? To: Gang, Lisa

emails.subject: RE: Break
emails.body: Yea I talked to her, I will let you know what she said when we take a break. Let me know when you are ready. Darren To: Cavanaugh, Darren
